code: export class CorporationsListParser{constructor(){this._data=[];}flush(){this._data=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){const count=wrapper.readInt();for(let i=0;i<count;i++){const id=wrapper.readInt();const name=wrapper.readString();const desc=wrapper.readString();const icon=wrapper.readString();const stock=wrapper.readInt();this._data.push({id,name,desc,icon,stock});}return true;}get corporations(){return this._data;}}
